title: Compound Interest Calculator Daily - Free Tool
description: Free compound interest calculator with daily compounding. See how your savings grow over time with the power of compound interest. Includes charts and breakdowns.
keywords: compound interest calculator daily, compound interest formula, savings growth calculator, investment calculator, daily compounding
intro: Calculate how your investment grows with daily compound interest. Enter principal, rate, and time to see your future balance.

faq.a: Compound interest is interest calculated on both the initial principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods.
With daily compounding, interest is calculated and added to your balance every day (365 times per year), resulting in slightly higher returns than monthly or annual compounding.

faq.q: What is the compound interest formula?
faq.a: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt), where A is final amount, P is principal, r is annual rate, n is compounding frequency, and t is time in years.
